testcase.name: Test Infrastructure Validation › playwright fixture loads and page mounts

failure.message: 00-setup.spec.ts:4:9 playwright fixture loads and page mounts

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › 00-setup.spec.ts:4:9 › Test Infrastructure Validation › playwright fixture loads and page mounts
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: locator.click: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: /Keyboard|Type/i })
8 | // Check for the main capture input existence to verify React hydrated successfully 9 | // Explicitly open text mode since Voice orb defaults to primary visibility > 10 | await page.getByRole('button', { name: /Keyboard|Type/i }).click(); | ^ 11 | 12 | const input = page.getByPlaceholder('What\'s on your mind?'); 13 | await expect(input).toBeVisible(); at /Users/siddharth/Documents/Claude/Life To Do/tests/e2e/specs/00-setup.spec.ts:10:68
